Class DRGenericElement

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRDimensionComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRGenericElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, DRIGenericElement, Serializable
public class DRGenericElement extends DRDimensionComponent implements DRIGenericElement
